name: Levodopa
summary: Levodopa has strong indication-specific human evidence for Parkinson's motor symptoms, but supplement/herb attribution should not be generalized beyond L-DOPA-driven preparations.
description: Levodopa is a clinically used dopamine precursor for Parkinson’s disease; any Mucuna-related findings should be attributed only to the specific levodopa exposure.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
